description: Knox declared Plaud ingest blocked due to missing API token without reading the Chrome login flow documented in skills/plaud-transcripts/SKILL.md. The skill explicitly covers the no-token case: open Chrome to web.plaud.ai, extract token from localStorage via JavaScript, cache it, then proceed. Knox read the fetch script output and stopped instead of following the skill recovery path.
correction: When a skill documents a recovery path for a failure mode, follow it. Do not declare blocked until all documented recovery steps are exhausted.
systemic_fix: Agent must read the full skill file before executing any step. Failure modes and recovery paths are part of the skill spec, not optional reading.
